meta.title: DEF CON 33 - RF Village  - Warflying in a Cessna, Part II -Matthew Thomassen, Sean McKeever
meta.description: our ongoing research, including things we have learned about the sniffing process and the impact of improved equipment, along with enhanced data analysis and visualizations to continue attempting to answer questions like “How many access points can you actually pick up from an airplane?”, “Is warflying better than wardriving or warbiking or warwarlking or warswimming?”, “Should I run WiGLE on my phone during my airline flight?”, “Are the airplanes flying overhead monitoring my WiFi?”, and “Why are you even doing this?”
